description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 3rd; Slot shoulders; Price 1,000 gp; Weight 1/4 lb. DESCRIPTION These thick leather cords wrap around the wearerâs biceps and shoulders. When worn, they make the wearerâs muscles appear larger than normal. The wearer treats his Strength score as 8 higher than normal when determining his carrying capacity. This bonus does not apply to combat, breaking items, or any other Strength -related rolls, it only contributes to the amount of equipment or material the wearer can carry. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, bull’s strength; Cost 500 gp.
